Legal

Privacy Policy

Effective date: March 26, 2026

tholent (“we”, “us”) operates tholent.com. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.

What we collect

When you contact us by email, we receive your email address and message contents. We do not add you to any mailing list without your explicit consent.

This site is hosted on GitHub Pages. GitHub may collect standard server log data. We do not operate our own analytics. We do not use cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party analytics.

How we use information

We use information only to respond to your inquiries, carry out work you have engaged us to perform, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell or share your personal information for marketing purposes.

AI and your information

Where AI tools are used in our work, we avoid exposing client or personal information to third-party AI services without explicit consent. You can read more on our collective page.

Your rights

You may have rights to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Contact us at hello@tholent.com to exercise these rights.

Contact

hello@tholent.com
